## Failure mode

What broke down?

```text
[Write here]
```

Possible examples:

- unclear problem definition
- inconsistent data trail
- no measurable output
- process instability
- no controllable variable
- unclear decision owner
- model output was not actionable
- feedback loop was missing
- pilot scope was too broad
- success metric was unclear

## What would have helped?

What could have improved the project?

```text
[Write here]
```

Examples:

- narrower pilot scope
- clearer operational bottleneck
- better data traceability
- stronger process mapping
- defined decision owner
- better feedback loop
- simpler baseline
- clearer success metric
- better uncertainty communication
